name: Alexandra Frost
title: Founder & Chief Investment Officer
bio: Founded Cipher Wealth Management 19 years ago with focus on global macro investing. Manages $175B applying macroeconomic analysis and global trend identification for absolute returns.

name: Marcus Beaumont
title: Chief Economist & Head of Research
bio: Leads macroeconomic research team providing strategic direction. PhD Economics from Cambridge with 26 years macro research experience and numerous published papers.

name: Susan Tang
title: Head of Global Macro Strategies
bio: Leads $95B global macro fund investing across currencies, commodities, and fixed income. 23 years global macro investing with track record of outperformance in diverse market environments.

name: Philippe Arnould
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Currency Trading
bio: Manages $42B currency trading fund exploiting FX cycles and interest rate differentials. 20 years forex expertise with specialization in carry trades and central bank analysis.

name: Rajesh Sharma
title: Head of Emerging Markets Macro
bio: Leads emerging markets macroeconomic investing team managing $38B. 19 years emerging markets expertise with deep relationships and proprietary intelligence across Asia, Latin America, and Africa.

name: Nathalie Giroux
title: Economist - Central Bank Policy
bio: Analyzes central bank policies and monetary framework changes impacting markets. 15 years policy research with strong track record predicting policy shifts and their market implications.

name: Rashid Al-Mansoori
title: Trader - Commodity Futures
bio: Executes commodity trading strategy across oil, metals, and agriculture. 18 years commodities trading expertise with focus on geopolitical event trading and supply disruption analysis.

name: Elena Kovacs
title: Strategist - Rates & Fixed Income Macro
bio: Provides strategic guidance on interest rate trends and fixed income positioning. 17 years rates strategy expertise with specialization in yield curve steepener/flattener positioning.

name: Christopher Okonkwo
title: Analyst - Geopolitical Risk
bio: Monitors geopolitical events and analyzes market implications. 11 years geopolitical analysis with networks in major financial centers for on-ground intelligence gathering.

name: Dr. Yuki Matsuda
title: Risk Manager - Macro Risk
bio: Manages macro risk framework for $175B global macro portfolio. 14 years macro risk with expertise in scenario analysis and correlation forecasting across asset classes.
